beat.title: Alden Asks About Last Job
beat.boundaryReason: Alden prompts the group to recount their last job, reveals his devotion to Dandelion House, and the party probes him before setting watches; the next beat starts with the morning departure.
dateEvidence: session.yaml gives drStart as 1750-10-03.
u0447 says they will arrive at Dandelion House tomorrow.
u0583 and u0674-u0696 keep the scene in the same night and watches.

sourceLines.text: Alright, as you're preparing dinner, sitting around the fire, chatting about everything and nothing.
sourceLines.raw: [u0443 | 00:40:21.660-00:40:28.000 | DM] Alright, as you're preparing dinner, sitting around the fire, chatting about everything and nothing.

sourceLines.text: Alden is sitting a little way. As he said each night when you've made a fire, he says, very simply and directly, I have a fear of fire, and perks himself a little ways farther back.

beat.title: Road To Dandelion House
beat.boundaryReason: The party breaks camp, travels through the increasingly strange forest, reaches Dandelion House, and hesitates at the threshold; the next beat begins as they enter the house.
dateEvidence: u0699-u0702 move from the watches into the morning and a long day's hike.
u0752 places part of the travel around noon.
u0778-u0783 move into sinking sunlight and arrival before dark.

beat.title: Into The Root Tunnel
beat.boundaryReason: The party wakes before dawn, descends through the basement and root cellar, crawls into the enormous root passage, and ends on the door closing behind them.
dateEvidence: u2011-u2017 say the party wakes before dawn after a long rest and Alden collects them.
u2019-u2048 place the party below the house in the basement and root cellar.
u2125-u2150 close the session with the door shut behind them in the tunnel.

sourceLines.text: You wake.
Hearing the clock chime…
sourceLines.raw: [u2012 | 02:39:37.970-02:39:40.559 | DM] Hearing the clock chime…

sourceLines.text: Whatever the appropriate number of hours are for a long rest, but still before dawn.
sourceLines.raw: [u2013 | 02:39:41.510-02:39:45.609 | DM] Whatever the appropriate number of hours are for a long rest, but still before dawn.

sourceLines.text: I don't know, 6, maybe?

sourceLines.text: It's the same footprint as the house.

sourceLines.text: The foundations of the walls above you spread out wider, so there are these sort of massive stone pillars that the house is resting on.
sourceLines.raw: [u2022 | 02:40:32.170-02:40:40.670 | DM] The foundations of the walls above you spread out wider, so there are these sort of massive stone pillars that the house is resting on.

sourceLines.text: And the stone foundation underfoot.

sourceLines.text: There are the remains of… I mean.

sourceLines.text: Anything and everything, long moldered and turned to dust.
sourceLines.raw: [u2025 | 02:40:47.490-02:40:53.099 | DM] Anything and everything, long moldered and turned to dust.

sourceLines.text: Wooden beams that still seem in good shape, and…
sourceLines.raw: [u2026 | 02:40:53.380-02:40:56.939 | DM] Wooden beams that still seem in good shape, and…

sourceLines.raw: [u2027 | 02:40:56.960-02:41:02.819 | DM] Wrought metal, and spare parts, and a workshop in one corner, and…

sourceLines.text: All the sorts of things that you would expect to find in the massive basement of an old, old manor house, but decrepit and crumbling.
sourceLines.raw: [u2028 | 02:41:03.550-02:41:10.219 | DM] All the sorts of things that you would expect to find in the massive basement of an old, old manor house, but decrepit and crumbling.

pocket, Alden takes out… another key. He had used one to unlock the door down to the basement.
sourceLines.raw: [u2030 | 02:41:13.220-02:41:20.250 | DM] pocket, Alden takes out… another key. He had used one to unlock the door down to the basement.

sourceLines.text: Takes out a.

Staircase that goes downwards, and the walls are a rough-hewn stone.
